title: Unity AI Bridge — Entity
description: Schema for a single entity file inside Assets/SceneData/<SceneName>/Entities/

uuid.description: UUID v4. Must match the filename (without .json extension).

name.description: Display name shown in the Unity hierarchy.

prefabPath.description: Project-relative path to the source prefab (e.g. Assets/Prefabs/Door.prefab), or a primitive identifier (primitive/Cube, primitive/Sphere, etc.).

parentUuid.description: UUID of the parent entity. Omit or null for root-level objects.

siblingIndex.description: Zero-based index among siblings under the same parent (or scene root). Determines child ordering for transform.GetChild(index), UI layout groups, canvas render order, etc.

transform.description: Local-space transform (world-space when parentUuid is absent).

pos.description: Local position [x, y, z] in metres.

rot.description: Local Euler angles [x, y, z] in degrees. Matches Unity Inspector values.

builtInComponents.description: Ordered list of serialized built-in Unity components (Colliders, Rigidbody, etc.) using Unity's internal SerializedProperty names. Treated as the complete truth — components absent from this array are removed. Property names use Unity's internal serialized names (m_Size, m_IsTrigger, etc.).

customData.description: Ordered list of serialized MonoBehaviour components. The Nth entry for a given type maps to the Nth component of that type on the GameObject.

type.description: Fully-qualified C# class name returned by component.GetType().FullName, e.g. MyGame.Environment.DoorScript.

componentEntry.description: One serialized component. 'type' identifies the class; remaining properties are the component's serialized fields.
